name: @codeflow/_spike-fcop-pythonia
description: P4 调研 spike — pythonia 同进程嵌入 Python 调 fcop@1.1.0 工程可行性验证。隔离子项目，不在 workspace 引用，不进 dependency graph。对应 TASK-20260511-005-PM-to-DEV。

_codeflow_spike.windows_python_path_override: PYTHON_BIN env var should point to Python 3.12 .exe with fcop installed
